text:
On Novig, a limit order lets you set the price you're willing to accept — it waits in the market until someone matches it at that price or better. A market order fills immediately at the best available price from counterparties already in the market.

Use a limit order when you're willing to wait for a specific price. Use a market order when you want to fill right away and don't mind taking the current best price.

A human on our team can walk you through examples if you want more detail on how this works on our platform specifically.

Novig Support
